failures.description: The agent made an ill-formed ProductCatalogSearch invocation instead of using the provided string item_id and product_id.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to check whether item 1151293680 of product 1656367028 has backlight=RGB. The required tool arguments were already available in index 1. At index 2, the Researcher prepared ProductCatalogSearch with {"product_id": 0}, omitting required item_id and using the wrong product_id value/type. The tool then explicitly rejected this as a SchemaError at index 3. This is not a connectivity, access, or guardrail issue.
